<Scene name="Hud" width="720" height="1280">
  <Graphics id="topBand" shape="roundRect" x="32" y="32" width="656" height="158" radius="24" fill="#111827" fillAlpha="0.82" strokeColor="#38bdf8" strokeWidth="2" strokeAlpha="0.65" />
  <Text id="scoreLabel" text="SCORE" x="60" y="58" fontSize="18" fontWeight="700" fill="#93c5fd" />
  <Text id="scoreText" text="000000" x="60" y="86" fontSize="42" fontWeight="700" fill="#f8fafc" />
  <Text id="waveLabel" text="WAVE" x="504" y="58" fontSize="18" fontWeight="700" fill="#c4b5fd" />
  <Text id="waveText" text="01" x="504" y="86" fontSize="42" fontWeight="700" fill="#f8fafc" />
  <Text id="timeLabel" text="TIME" x="504" y="136" fontSize="16" fontWeight="700" fill="#94a3b8" />
  <Text id="timeText" text="00:00" x="560" y="134" fontSize="22" fontWeight="700" fill="#e2e8f0" />
  <Text id="hpLabel" text="HP" x="60" y="216" fontSize="20" fontWeight="700" fill="#fca5a5" />
  <Graphics id="hpBack" shape="roundRect" x="110" y="214" width="548" height="28" radius="14" fill="#1f2937" />
  <Graphics id="hpFill" shape="roundRect" x="110" y="214" width="548" height="28" radius="14" fill="#ef4444" />
  <Text id="energyLabel" text="ENERGY" x="60" y="266" fontSize="18" fontWeight="700" fill="#fde68a" />
  <Graphics id="energyBack" shape="roundRect" x="158" y="266" width="500" height="20" radius="10" fill="#1f2937" />
  <Graphics id="energyFill" shape="roundRect" x="158" y="266" width="500" height="20" radius="10" fill="#facc15" />
  <Text id="hintText" text="Drag or use WASD / arrows" x="60" y="1204" fontSize="22" fontWeight="700" fill="#bae6fd" />
</Scene>
